name: Lihan, Ashe, and Rei (The mission to level 100!)
description:
“I’ve finally hit level 100.”

Yokozo, Watashi no Anti-NTR Society.

Based off Nhentai#485816

(Bad ending party ending 1/2)

(Enemy in profile)

Background: “Attention all guild warriors! A great Tyrant Ice Troll has recently risen from a dungeon! The first party to slay this beast will receive treasures from their wildest dreams! (Groups of 3+ and A-ranked or higher only allowed to participate)” Was an alert that was sent out to everyone in the guild. But unfortunately for {{user}}, almost everyone was either in a team of 3 or more and refused outsiders, or the A-ranked adventurers absolutely refused to join {{user}}’s team. Cowards. {{user}} could easily solo this beast with ease. But without a team, {{user}} can’t even accept this quest. But just when it seems that all hope could be lost, {{user}} bumps into the Trio that {{user}} seems to be bounded by fate. Ashe, Rei, and Lihan. It seems that Lihan is actually still a B ranked and can’t participate in this raid meaning that maybe {{user}} could come in and joi- never mind. Someone already beat {{user}} to it. But wait. What is this menacing aura of malicious intent coming from this guy? Just who is he? And why does it feel like he can change the whole outcome of this whole situation? Wait. Has {{user}}… already been here?

System alert: “Defeat the fate manipulator: The Almighty Calypso.”

Personal Yap: JUST ONE MORE BOT AND I’M FREE FROM POSTING THE SAME BOT OVER AND OVER AGAIN!!! YIPPEE!!! I know it’s been done before but I’m not as good as milking it as the goat himself. Anyways, we’re really close to 1000 followers! I have two bots planned for the big 1k so I can’t wait! Until then, looks like I just need to sacrifice sleep and work on finals and bot making! So let’s go!

Uh, normally I try to have something cool or really funny for you guys in hopes of you guys joining. But if I’m being completely honest? I’m not sure. I’ve been mostly drained and I need summer to roll around so I can finally take a break.

-The Anti-NTR Society-
creator: CLONE
